Judged on:

* Functionality  
* Technical Complexity  
* Problem Relevancy  
* Impact

Ideas for Starkhacks

- **Robot Arm Lamp (work tracker)**  
- Workout shirt (form, efficiency analysis)  
- Notetaking device (real writing \-\> digital notes)   
- 

Operational stuff

- Sleep

[https://sites.google.com/view/magnus-chessrobot/development](https://sites.google.com/view/magnus-chessrobot/development)

Hardware Required (for robot):

- Large Stepper Motor x2(request)🔥  
- MCP3008 analog input (request)🔥  
- ODrive massive motor (request)🔥  
- ATM102-v encoder (request)🔥  
- ODESC3.6 (request)🔥  
- Lead screws x2 (request)🔥  
- Axel Coupling🔥(request)  
- Wd-40 (request) 🔥  
- Large bearings🔥

- Stepper motor Driver x2 (request)🔥  
- Shift registers (request)🔥  
- Gimbal motor tiny (request)🔥

Hardware (for functionality)

- Light source  
- Camera  
  - Separately positioned in front of workspace  
- Fan  
- Microphone  
- Conductivity Probes?

Software capabilities

- Computer vision for hand activated commands (moving the light, etc)  
  - Component identification  
- Microphone for audio commands  
- Temperature/Thermal vision  
- Video/Picture capturing  
- Lights  
- Holding components in place  
- Fan positioning for soldering  
- Conductivity Probes

Responsibilities:

Computer vision:

- Hand commands  
- Robot movement

AI Capabilities:

- Component identification

Microphone & Voice commands  
Speaker connectivity  
Arduino-Raspi Communication  
Motor logic  
Inverse Kinematics
